# v1.1.0 Template Engine

## Summary

This release publishes the first governed template baseline for SistemaMultiagente_SDLC.

## Highlights

- Logicless template engine backed by `templates/manifest.yaml`.
- Governed C1/C2/C3/C4/C7/C9 template extraction.
- AJV config validation.
- Dynamic migrations infrastructure.
- Community baseline: MIT license, contribution docs, code of conduct, security policy, issue templates and PR template.

## Validation

- `npm run validate`
- `npm test`
